task: FrankX.ai social media and website image/infographic generation loop
surface: social images, website hero frames, OG frames, infographic frames
audience: AI architects, serious creators, founders, and operators
first_read: FrankX turns AI capability into practical command systems for content, tools, revenue, and publishing.

references.label: FrankX brand pack
references.reason: Brand, copy, tokens, and visual identity rules.

references.label: FrankX content strategy
references.reason: Pillars, weekly targets, comparison/AEO traffic strategy, and infographic cadence.

references.label: Existing visual ledgers
references.reason: Reuse the repo's hero/social review and source logging pattern.

direction.signature: FrankX visuals should look like command systems a founder can use, not AI mood boards.
system: safe negative space for later overlays

asset_quality.why_premium: Custom generated frames based on FrankX brand, content strategy, and actual visual ledgers.

artifacts.notes: Square command-room visual, 1254x1254. Strong central table, safe overlay space, no baked text. Score 27/30.
Wide AEO citation archive visual, 1672x941. Strong physical archive and citation aperture, useful right-side overlay space. Score 28/30.
Square Personal AI CoE tool-stack workbench, 1254x1254. Practical and credible, but paper-note marks create minor generated-scribble risk. Score 26/30.
Vertical creator OS content engine frame, 941x1672. Strong craft and phone crop, but more abstract than the content loop. Score 26/30.
Wide Faceless Creator AI Stack production studio, 1672x941. Concrete creator evidence and useful right-side overlay space. Score 27/30.
Square model/tool routing decision desk, 1254x1254. Immediate routing read, generic symbols, no text artifacts. Score 29/30.
Wide refresh queue traffic/staleness physical infographic frame, 1672x941. Clear input-priority-output flow. Score 29/30.
Wide website hero command-layer frame, 1672x941. Strong left overlay space, subtle X-shaped command geometry, concrete founder operations zones. Score 29/30.
Square AI architecture workflow blueprint, 1254x1254. Clean physical topology, strong upper overlay band, no fake UI/text. Score 29/30.
Wide offer ladder and revenue engine physical infographic, 1672x941. Clear input, qualification, offer ladder, proof, and revenue flow. Minor tiny mark texture on deal modules. Score 28/30.
Wide website/social compounding strategy map, 1672x941. Clean content, authority, distribution, revenue, and feedback loop with blank seamless modules. Score 30/30.
Square physical AI stack comparison matrix, 1254x1254. Selected route, blank rows/columns, strong overlay band, no text artifacts. Score 30/30.
Vertical creator revenue flywheel physical infographic, 941x1672. Clear phone-native creator-to-revenue loop with blank modules and revenue/reinvestment path. Score 30/30.
Contact sheet for 13 accepted FrankX image-loop assets, 2120x1648. Review labels are only in the contact sheet, not in source assets.
Wide exact-copy overlay variant for website/social compounding strategy, 1672x941. Text fit and contrast passed.
Square exact-copy overlay variant for AI stack comparison matrix, 1254x1254. Text fit and contrast passed.
Vertical exact-copy overlay variant for creator revenue flywheel, 941x1672. Text fit and contrast passed.

known_risks: Exact data labels and complex infographics should be code/design overlays rather than relying on image generation text.
Current production checkout contains unrelated dirty files; this loop uses additive-only paths.
